name: chain_gov_contract_the_contractor_shall_prov
method: [GOV CONTRACT] THE CONTRACTOR SHALL PROVIDE ON-SITE AND OFF-SITE FUNCTIONAL RESOURCES TO SUPPORT THE PRINTING AND GRAPHIC DESIGN SERVICES. (deadline: 2027-02-14)

stages.task: SAM.gov API scan for printing/graphic design contracts — output raw opportunity list with value, deadline, agency, set-aside type
Score opportunities by value * broker margin / deadline urgency; flag 8a/WOSB set-asides as priority (3-5x less competition); discard value < $25K
Match top contracts to local print shop leads; generate capability statement + teaming outreach email; add to cold email queue
